S.FORM: kinbhoyaw zyuwaw na pslpyungan squ kinbhoyaw na mkgluw.
S.PHON: kinβħojaw zjuwaw na ps~ɕlpjuŋan s~ɕqu kinβħojaw na mkɣluw.
